changes.summary: Added GetMeritHistoryTransactionsUseCase (BC-02): assertMeritHistoryTransactionsAccess, paginated WalletService.getUserTransactions reads, batch enrichment via enrichMeritHistoryTransactions, and mapMeritHistoryTransactionRow DTO mapping. Retires router-owned enrichment (V-08).
Added GetMeritHistoryDashboardUseCase: reuses transactions access guard and delegates KPI/series/breakdown to WalletService.getMeritHistoryDashboard (inv-16 authoritative wallet reads).
Added GetCommunityMeritHistoryUseCase: community membership gate, WalletService.getCommunityMeritHistoryTransactions, enrichment, subject display names, and shared row mapping.

Delegated getTransactions, getCommunityMeritHistory, and getMeritHistoryDashboard to new use cases via create* factories; removed assertMeritHistoryTransactionsAccess and inline enrichment/mapping (V-08 closed).

notes: Use cases instantiated manually in router (applicationUseCaseProviders registration deferred). PaginationInputSchema retained in router; skip/limit resolution moved into use cases.
